scenario_config.name: realistic_school_day
_dataset_notes: 8 weeks history: 6 cold (compacted to rollup tables), 2 hot (raw rows in Run/TurnEvent).
Hot data volume: 60 students x 2 weeks x 3 runs x ~20 turns ≈ 7,200 hot turns (T=20 per docs/research/ingest-capacity-model.md).
This is deliberately modest and representative of one teacher at a school with ~1000 runs/week total.
Cold rollup tables hold 6 weeks of compacted history per student.
_traffic_notes: 1 req/sec per traffic class = 5 req/sec total.
VUs are sized by Little's Law: rate x expected_response_time x headroom.
turn_insights gets more VUs because it is the slowest endpoint (2-10s depending on server).
If dropped_iterations > 0 for any class, reduce that class rate before drawing conclusions.
A green load_health on this scenario means the server can handle realistic school-day traffic.
